title: Formosa Mambo
overview: When a band of kidnappers attempts to collect a ransom for their young hostage, the boy’s family dismisses it as a prank. Stuck with a youngster to care for and on the lam, the stage is set for a dark comedy of errors. We get this and much more with delicious plot twists and a growing pile-up of fraud and double crosses.

trailers.title: 《寶島漫波》電影預告
trailers.channel_name: 海鵬影業 Swallow Wings Films
